_comment: TEMPLATE — copy this file to config.json next to the exe and edit. The app reads config.json (or a path passed on the command line). Unknown keys like this one are ignored.
_search_ous_comment: Each entry is either a plain string (= include child OUs) or an object with a 'subtree' flag. subtree=true: this OU and all child OUs. subtree=false: only groups directly in this OU.
